summary: Cross-chain mapping for the Orbit Bridge benchmark. Ethereum holds the custodial WBTC/ETH/USDT/USDC/DAI balance via OrbitVault; Orbit chain (chain_id 9001) holds the wrapped representations. The 2024-01-01 attack drained the Ethereum-side custody only — Orbit-side balances were unaffected, but the wrapped tokens on Orbit were left unbacked.

contracts.note: Orbit-chain-side counterpart. Receives wrapped representation mint instructions from off-chain relayer when Ethereum-side `lock` events are observed. The 2024-01-01 attack drained the Ethereum custody only — Orbit-side balances were untouched, but the existing wrapped tokens on Orbit were left unbacked.

entity_map.role: Ten ECDSA farmer (validator) addresses administered by Ozys-affiliated staff and partner organisations. Threshold 7-of-10 for any cross-chain action.
Ethereum-side validator-quorum manager + custody pool. Holds the locked ERC20 balances and runs the 7-of-10 threshold check before unlocking.
Orbit-chain-side mint/burn router for wrapped representations.
Attacker EOA cluster that received the 5 single-block drain transactions in 18900155. Suspected Lazarus per Match Systems.

asset_map.notes: Largest single asset — ~$30M at attack-time prices.
Native ETH leg, custodied as WETH. ~$10M drained.

orbit.function_signature: withdraw / mint counterpart on Orbit chain
orbit.note: Orbit-side counterpart is informational; this benchmark fuzzes the Ethereum-side custody only.

message_map.message_id_field: digest = keccak256(abi.encode(target, value, data, nonce, address(this)))
message_map.proof_field: bytes[] sigs (>= 7 ECDSA signatures, ascending recovered-address order)

invariants_for_fuzzer.description: Every Unlocked event must correspond to a prior `execute` call carrying >= 7 valid distinct signatures from the configured farmer set.

Only addresses in the constructor's signer list (size 10) may contribute to the threshold quorum. (On-chain enforced; off-chain assumption 'fewer than 7 farmer keys compromised at once' is what the incident broke.)
totalLocked[token] >= cumulative unlocked[token]; vault cannot release more than it has custodied for any single token, even across 5 single-block batched receipts.
Each (target, value, data, nonce, vault_address) tuple may unlock at most once — replay protection on the digest cache.

(Architectural / off-chain) 7 of 10 farmer hosts must not be reachable from a single attacker foothold. Production Orbit failed this — 70% concentration ratio in one campaign is the highest in the off-chain benchmark suite.
